
### example 3  {.smaller}

<!-- \lstset{language=C,style=smaller} -->
 
```
unsigned a, b;
void foo(unsigned c) {
    int *p;
    if (a > 100) {
        p = &a;
    } else {
        p = &b;
    }
    *p += c;
    assert(a + b == c);
}

```
 ![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example-ptr.figure.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center }
